extension.description: The open-source .NET Language Server — C# and F# intelligence for every editor. Zero licenses. Zero vendor lock-in.
configuration.title: SharpLsp
setting.lspPath: Absolute path to the `sharplsp` binary. Leave empty to let Shipwright resolve the bundled binary, environment variables, package manager installation, or `$PATH`.
setting.csharpSidecarPath: Absolute path to the `sharplsp-sidecar-csharp` binary. Leave empty to let Shipwright resolve the bundled sidecar, environment variable, or `$PATH`.
setting.fsharpSidecarPath: Absolute path to the `sharplsp-sidecar-fsharp` binary. Leave empty to let Shipwright resolve the bundled sidecar, environment variable, or `$PATH`.
setting.server.extraArgs: Extra arguments passed to the `sharplsp` process.
setting.trace.server: Trace LSP communication between VS Code and the SharpLsp server.
setting.logging.level: Log level for the SharpLsp server (maps to `RUST_LOG`).
setting.fsi.extraArgs: Extra arguments passed to `dotnet fsi` when starting F# Interactive (e.g. `--define:DEBUG`, `--use:setup.fsx`). Honoured only in trusted workspaces.
setting.debug.netcoredbgPath: Path to netcoredbg executable. Leave empty for auto-detection.
setting.inlayHints.parameterNames: Show parameter name hints in method calls.
setting.inlayHints.typeInference: Show type inference hints for var declarations and lambdas.
setting.inlayHints.pipelineTypes: Show type hints for F# pipeline operators.
setting.nuget.includePrerelease: Include prerelease versions in NuGet package search results.
setting.hotReload.onSave: Automatically start hot reload on file save when a dotnet watch session is active.
setting.testLens.enabled: Show pass/fail status, Run Test, and Debug Test lenses above test methods.
setting.solutionExplorer.autoReveal: Reveal and select the active editor's file in the SharpLsp Solution Explorer, mirroring `explorer.autoReveal`.
setting.memberSortOrder.hierarchy: Sort tiebreaker order for **Sort Members**. Members are grouped by the first criterion, then sub-sorted by the second, then the third.
setting.memberSortOrder.accessibilityOrd: Access modifier priority for **Sort Members** (first = highest priority).
setting.memberSortOrder.categoryOrder: Member kind priority for **Sort Members** (first = highest priority).
debugger.label: SharpLsp .NET Debugger
debugger.launch.program: Path to the .NET assembly to debug.
debugger.snippet.launch.label: SharpLsp: Launch .NET Project
debugger.snippet.launch.description: Launch a .NET project with SharpLsp debugger
debugger.snippet.attach.label: SharpLsp: Attach to .NET Process
